span.p: print 'The maximum number of accounts has been reached. You can't create a new account now.'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: print 'to create an account you've to log out'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: print 'Choose a 3 digit pin code that starts without 0 for your account'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: print 'Your account is created successfully! Your account number is new_acc'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
account[count][0] = new_acc
account[count][1] = login_pin
balance[count] = new_balance
logged_in_user = count
count = count + 1

span.p: login_acc = account[logged_in_user][0] - manager_account Your account number: account[logged_in_user][0]
